name: kh-uaf
description: KH Universal Agent Framework skills, DAG role artifact orchestration, standard-template functional specification exports, documentation-grade type-aware deliverable exports, evidence gates, retention cleanup, and local orchestration harness for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Personal UAF skillbook and orchestration harness.
interface.longDescription: KH UAF packages host-readable skills, goal and memory state, domain design artifacts, DAG-based role orchestration with runtime role artifacts, standard-template functional specification exports, documentation-grade type-aware user-facing deliverable exports, evidence-enforced review/QA gates, retention cleanup, and local Python orchestration contracts for Codex workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use KH UAF to plan and run this project.
List the KH UAF skills available here.
Resume the current UAF goal ledger.
